languages.original_text: "By my determination, the local recreational customs are primitive, but intriguing. However, ingesting such toxins is not the most effective approach to calming the mind, based on my statistical findings. No, Nuncius, those were indeed experiments, not tastings."

languages.text: "Местные рекреационные обычаи определяю, как примитивные, но любопытные. Однако принятие подобных токсинов не самый эффективный подход к успокоению разума, исходя из статистики моих экспериментов. Нет, Нунциус, это были эксперименты, а не дегустация".

"By my determination, the local recreational customs are primitive, but intriguing. However, ingesting such toxins is not the most effective approach to calming the mind, based on my statistical findings. No, Nuncius, those were indeed experiments, not tastings."

traits.locale_text: "By my determination, the local recreational customs are primitive, but intriguing. However, ingesting such toxins is not the most effective approach to calming the mind, based on my statistical findings. No, Nuncius, those were indeed experiments, not tastings."

"By my determination, the local recreational customs are primitive, but intriguing. However, ingesting such toxins is not the most effective approach to calming the mind, based on my statistical findings. No, Nuncius, those were indeed experiments, not tastings."

"By my determination, the local recreational customs are primitive, but intriguing. However, ingesting such toxins is not the most effective approach to calming the mind, based on my statistical findings. No, Nuncius, those were indeed experiments, not tastings."

languages.text: «Según mi evaluación, las costumbres locales de entretenimiento son primitivas, pero intrigantes. Sin embargo, ingerir estas toxinas no es la forma más eficaz de calmar la mente, de acuerdo con mis análisis estadísticos. No, Nuncius, eran experimentos de verdad, no catas».
languages.original_text: "By my determination, the local recreational customs are primitive, but intriguing. However, ingesting such toxins is not the most effective approach to calming the mind, based on my statistical findings. No, Nuncius, those were indeed experiments, not tastings."

traits.locale_text: «Según mi evaluación, las costumbres locales de entretenimiento son primitivas, pero intrigantes. Sin embargo, ingerir estas toxinas no es la forma más eficaz de calmar la mente, de acuerdo con mis análisis estadísticos. No, Nuncius, eran experimentos de verdad, no catas».

languages.text: 「私の判定によれば、この地の娯楽の慣習は原始的ですが、興味をそそります。とはいえ、私の統計的知見に基づけば、このような毒物を摂取することは、精神を鎮めるのに最も効果的な方法とは言えません。いいえ、ヌンキウス、あれは確かに実験であって、味見ではありませんでした」
languages.original_text: "By my determination, the local recreational customs are primitive, but intriguing. However, ingesting such toxins is not the most effective approach to calming the mind, based on my statistical findings. No, Nuncius, those were indeed experiments, not tastings."

traits.locale_text: 「私の判定によれば、この地の娯楽の慣習は原始的ですが、興味をそそります。とはいえ、私の統計的知見に基づけば、このような毒物を摂取することは、精神を鎮めるのに最も効果的な方法とは言えません。いいえ、ヌンキウス、あれは確かに実験であって、味見ではありませんでした」

languages.text: “据我判断，本地的消遣方式虽原始，却也颇有趣味。不过根据统计结果，摄入此类毒素并非平复心神的最高效方案。不，努恩修斯，我是在进行实验，并非赏味。”
languages.original_text: "By my determination, the local recreational customs are primitive, but intriguing. However, ingesting such toxins is not the most effective approach to calming the mind, based on my statistical findings. No, Nuncius, those were indeed experiments, not tastings."

traits.locale_text: “据我判断，本地的消遣方式虽原始，却也颇有趣味。不过根据统计结果，摄入此类毒素并非平复心神的最高效方案。不，努恩修斯，我是在进行实验，并非赏味。”

languages.text: "Meinen Untersuchungen zufolge sind die hiesigen Erholungsgepflogenheiten primitiv, aber faszinierend. Der Verzehr derartiger Toxine ist der Beruhigung des Geistes allerdings nicht dienlich, wenn meine statistischen Daten korrekt sind. Nein, Nuncius, das waren tatsächlich Experimente, keine Verkostungen."
languages.original_text: "By my determination, the local recreational customs are primitive, but intriguing. However, ingesting such toxins is not the most effective approach to calming the mind, based on my statistical findings. No, Nuncius, those were indeed experiments, not tastings."

traits.locale_text: "Meinen Untersuchungen zufolge sind die hiesigen Erholungsgepflogenheiten primitiv, aber faszinierend. Der Verzehr derartiger Toxine ist der Beruhigung des Geistes allerdings nicht dienlich, wenn meine statistischen Daten korrekt sind. Nein, Nuncius, das waren tatsächlich Experimente, keine Verkostungen."

languages.text: « Je trouve les coutumes récréatives locales primitives, mais intrigantes. Cependant, selon les statistiques dont je dispose, ingérer de telles toxines n'est pas l'approche la plus efficace pour atteindre le calme de l'esprit. Non, Nuncius, il s'agissait d'expérimentations, et non de dégustations. »
languages.original_text: "By my determination, the local recreational customs are primitive, but intriguing. However, ingesting such toxins is not the most effective approach to calming the mind, based on my statistical findings. No, Nuncius, those were indeed experiments, not tastings."

traits.locale_text: « Je trouve les coutumes récréatives locales primitives, mais intrigantes. Cependant, selon les statistiques dont je dispose, ingérer de telles toxines n'est pas l'approche la plus efficace pour atteindre le calme de l'esprit. Non, Nuncius, il s'agissait d'expérimentations, et non de dégustations. »

languages.text: "Benim belirlememe göre yerel rekreasyon gelenekleri ilkel ama merak uyandırıcı. Ancak istatistiksel bulgularıma dayanarak söyleyebilirim ki bu tür toksinleri tüketmek, zihni sakinleştirmek için en etkili yaklaşım değil. Hayır Nuncius; onlar tadım değil, gerçekten deneydi."
languages.original_text: "By my determination, the local recreational customs are primitive, but intriguing. However, ingesting such toxins is not the most effective approach to calming the mind, based on my statistical findings. No, Nuncius, those were indeed experiments, not tastings."

traits.locale_text: "Benim belirlememe göre yerel rekreasyon gelenekleri ilkel ama merak uyandırıcı. Ancak istatistiksel bulgularıma dayanarak söyleyebilirim ki bu tür toksinleri tüketmek, zihni sakinleştirmek için en etkili yaklaşım değil. Hayır Nuncius; onlar tadım değil, gerçekten deneydi."
